headline: Paycom named top retail workforce management solution provider for second consecutive year
summary: OKLAHOMA CITY, April 23, 2026--Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) ("Paycom"), a leading provider of comprehensive, cloud-based human capital management software, was named Overall Workforce Management Solution Provider of the Year by RetailTech Breakthrough Awards for the second consecutive year. The awards recognize innovative technology companies in the retail industry, which currently accounts for about 15.4 million domestic jobs, according to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.
